title: 300 drones
title_en: 300 drones
description: In the meantime, more than 300 UAVs have flown to the Russian Federation to organize a riot - monitors And Russian monitoring channels are extremely pessimistic - they whine that up to three thousand drones may fly over Mother Russia in the next day.
description_en: In the meantime, more than 300 UAVs have flown to the Russian Federation to organize a riot - monitors And Russian monitoring channels are extremely pessimistic - they whine that up to three thousand drones may fly over Mother Russia in the next day.
description_uk: Тем временем устраивать гойду на рф полетели более 300 БПЛА, - мониторы А российские мониторинговые каналы источают крайний пессимизм - скулят, что в ближайшие сутки по матушке-россии может прилететь уже до трех тысяч дронов.

description: 👀 In Russia, there may be a secret project to place nuclear missiles on the seabed - an investigation by WDR and NDR with reference to Western intelligence services. According to the German TV channel Tagesschau, the Scythian project is implied. As journalists report, the Russian Federation could develop a system for placing nuclear missiles in special containers or mines at great depth with the possibility of remote...

As journalists report, the Russian Federation could develop a system for placing nuclear missiles in special containers or mines at great depth with the possibility of remote...

Как сообщают журналисты, рф могла разрабатывать систему размещения ядерных ракет в специальных контейнерах или шахтах на большой глубине с возможностью дистанционного...

description: Today, in Slavutych, Mayor Yuriy Fomichev and Head of the Kyiv OVA, Mykola Kalashnyk, discussed the tasks needed to strengthen the city: logistics, defense, energy. It is important that the things announced during the previous working trip here are carried out, and, of course, this work should be prompt and high-quality - such that people feel it. I am grateful to everyone who works every day for the city and...
description_en: Today, in Slavutych, Mayor Yuriy Fomichev and Head of the Kyiv OVA, Mykola Kalashnyk, discussed the tasks needed to strengthen the city: logistics, defense, energy. It is important that the things announced during the previous working trip here are carried out, and, of course, this work should be prompt and high-quality - such that people feel it. I am grateful to everyone who works every day for the city and...
description_uk: Сьогодні у Славутичі з міським головою Юрієм Фомічевим і начальником Київської ОВА Миколою Калашником обговорили завдання, які потрібні для посилення міста: логістика, захист, енергетика. Важливо, що речі, озвучені під час попередньої робочої поїздки сюди, виконуються, і, звісно, робота ця має бути оперативною та якісною – такою, щоб люди це відчували. Вдячний усім, хто щодня працює для міста та...

title: Dnipro: Drone strike
title_en: Dnipro: Drone strike
description: Russian drones hits apartment buildings in Dnipro injuring 15, including 13-year-old boy. Dnipro Mayor Borys Filatov reported that most of the injured were taken to hospitals. People have suffered shrapnel wounds, burns, and lacerations.

description: A good meeting with the heads of communities of Kyiv region and Chernihiv region. Thank you all for your meaningful work and for caring so much about your communities and people and all of our Ukraine. They discussed protection against potential Russian threats in the Chernihiv-Kyiv direction and strengthening air defense and defense against drones in the north of Ukraine. The Ministry of Defense has a corresponding task. Threats that have been there since the first days of full-scale...
description_en: A good meeting with the heads of communities of Kyiv region and Chernihiv region. Thank you all for your meaningful work and for caring so much about your communities and people and all of our Ukraine. They discussed protection against potential Russian threats in the Chernihiv-Kyiv direction and strengthening air defense and defense against drones in the north of Ukraine. The Ministry of Defense has a corresponding task. Threats that have been there since the first days of full-scale...
description_uk: Хороша зустріч із керівниками громад Київщини та Чернігівщини. Дякую всім за змістовну роботу й те, що так дбаєте про свої громади та людей і всю нашу Україну. Обговорили захист від потенційних російських загроз на Чернігівсько-Київському напрямку та зміцнення ППО й захисту від дронів на півночі України. Міністерство оборони має відповідне завдання. Загрози, які були з перших днів повномасштабної...

title: Kyiv: Casualties reported
title_en: Kyiv: Casualties reported
description: Ukraine aims to inflict 200 Russian casualties per square kilometer of advance, Fedorov says. While Russia lost 67 soldiers per square kilometer of advance in October, that figure rose to 165 in January, 244 in February, 254 in March, and 179 in April, according to Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov.
description_en: Ukraine aims to inflict 200 Russian casualties per square kilometer of advance, Fedorov says. While Russia lost 67 soldiers per square kilometer of advance in October, that figure rose to 165 in January, 244 in February, 254 in March, and 179 in April, according to Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov.

While Russia lost 67 soldiers per square kilometer of advance in October, that figure rose to 165 in January, 244 in February, 254 in March, and 179 in April, according to Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov.

description: Ukraine showed its own variant of "Shakheda" - the "Behemoth" drone Culver Aerospace together with GLEFA presented a medium-range strike drone that has already been used in combat. Of the main ones: ▪️fly at a distance of up to 300 km; ▪️ carries 75 kg of warheads; ▪️ it has a tandem charge — a shock core and thermobaric ammunition; ▪️can go at a low altitude, complicating the work of air defense; ▪️ works like in...
description_en: Ukraine showed its own variant of "Shakheda" - the "Behemoth" drone Culver Aerospace together with GLEFA presented a medium-range strike drone that has already been used in combat. Of the main ones: ▪️fly at a distance of up to 300 km; ▪️ carries 75 kg of warheads; ▪️ it has a tandem charge — a shock core and thermobaric ammunition; ▪️can go at a low altitude, complicating the work of air defense; ▪️ works like in...
description_uk: Украина показала собственный вариант «Шахеда» — дрон «Бегемот» Компания Culver Aerospace совместно с GLEFA представила ударный дрон средней дальности, который уже прошел боевое применение. Из главного: ▪️летит на расстояние до 300 км; ▪️несет 75 кг боевой части; ▪️у него тандемный заряд — ударное ядро и термобарический боеприпас; ▪️может идти на малой высоте, усложняя работу ПВО; ▪️работает как в...

title: Kyiv: Air defense active
title_en: Kyiv: Air defense active
description: Ukraine developing low-cost interceptor missiles for Russian Shahed-type drones, Fedorov says. "We have already identified solutions that are nearly ready and have begun testing them," Fedorov said at a closed-door press briefing.
description_en: Ukraine developing low-cost interceptor missiles for Russian Shahed-type drones, Fedorov says. "We have already identified solutions that are nearly ready and have begun testing them," Fedorov said at a closed-door press briefing.

title: We are taking another step to strengthen our largest and most...
title_en: We are taking another step to strengthen our largest and most...
title_uk: Ми робимо ще один крок, щоб зміцнити нашу найбільшу та найбільш...
description: We are taking another step to strengthen our largest and most important national award in the field of culture and arts - the Shevchenko Award. Last year, curatorship, photography and design were added to the list of nominations. This year we are adding architecture. The Shevchenko Prize will now reflect the creative potential of our people much more broadly. And the most important thing is that Ukrainians feel real respect for the award...
description_en: We are taking another step to strengthen our largest and most important national award in the field of culture and arts - the Shevchenko Award. Last year, curatorship, photography and design were added to the list of nominations. This year we are adding architecture. The Shevchenko Prize will now reflect the creative potential of our people much more broadly. And the most important thing is that Ukrainians feel real respect for the award...
description_uk: Робимо ще один крок на посилення нашої найбільшої і найбільш вагомої національної премії в галузі культури та мистецтв – Шевченківської премії. Торік додали в перелік номінацій кураторство, фотомистецтво та дизайн. Цього року додаємо архітектуру. Шевченківська премія тепер відображатиме значно ширше творчий потенціал нашого народу. І найголовніше – щоб українці відчували справжню повагу до премії...

Вдячний за фахову та оперативну роботу для притягнення Росії до фінансової відповідальності за все, що вона робить проти України та наших українських компаній. title: Kyiv: Ballistic missile launch detected
title_en: Kyiv: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: Russia allegedly delivers nuclear warheads for joint exercises with Belarus. Belarus’s Defense Ministry released videos on May 21 showing what it said were heavy equipment allegedly carrying nuclear warheads through a forest, ballistic missile submarines heading to sea training areas, and personnel mounting missiles on aircraft launchers.
description_en: Russia allegedly delivers nuclear warheads for joint exercises with Belarus. Belarus’s Defense Ministry released videos on May 21 showing what it said were heavy equipment allegedly carrying nuclear warheads through a forest, ballistic missile submarines heading to sea training areas, and personnel mounting missiles on aircraft launchers.
